title: Ultimate Mapmaker + Record
description: Ultimate Mapmaker Modpack for easy building, record and create maps for Minecraft Vanilla. Include builder, record, skin changer and visuals tools.
body:
![Ultimate Mapmaker Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcab09c8dbc7d0c4b6dbd5a7b890278e6435bc78.png)

The **Ultimate Mapmaker** is the perfect modpack for creators who want to design, build, and record stunning Minecraft Vanilla maps with ease. Whether you’re crafting adventure maps, cinematic builds, or simply showcasing your creations, this pack gives you all the tools you need in one place.

Packed with mods focused on **map building, world editing, record and utilities**. With powerful editing tools, performance optimizations, and handy utilities for creators, you’ll bring your vision to life.

Features:
 

🟩  **World Editing Tools** – Speed up building with powerful utilities like WorldEdit and Axiom.

 

🟥  **Recording & Cinematics** – Tools for smooth camera paths, shaders, and presentation-ready visuals.

 

🟦  **Performance Enhancements** – Optimized for creative mode and smooth recording sessions.

 

🟨  **Creator Utilities** – Commands, shortcuts, and helpful mods designed for mapmakers.

 

Whether you’re an experienced mapmaker or just starting out, Ultimate Mapmaker is your all-in-one toolbox for building amazing Minecraft worlds and sharing them with others.
